## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `anvil ...`
2. Type `...`
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What should happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happens.

## Environment

- OS: (e.g., macOS 15.2, Ubuntu 24.04)
- Rust version: (`rustc --version`)
- Anvil version: (`anvil --version`)
- Backend: (e.g., Ollama 0.6.2)
- Model: (e.g., qwen3-coder:30b)
